title: phaseolus vulgaris var. ferrugineus
intro: Phaseolus vulgaris var. ferrugineus, commonly known as rusty kidney bean, is a variety of the common bean plant that belongs to the legume family. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Phaseolus vulgaris var. ferrugineus include reducing the risk of heart disease, managing diabetes, and supporting digestive health. The plant can be prepared into various herbal remedies, such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to alleviate symptoms of various health conditions.
